texto: Darwin did not know what a bitter satire he wrote on mankind ... when he showed that free competition, the struggle for existence, which the economists celebrate as the highest historical achievement, is the normal state of the animal kingdom. Only conscious organization of social production, in which production and distribution are carried on in a planned way, can lift mankind above the rest of the animal.
explicacao: Citação de Friedrick Engels sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Darwin did not know what a bitter satire he wrote on mankind ... when he showed that free competi…” articula reflexao, communism, democracy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como democracy e engelism.
